word: G246 - ἀλλόφυλος - allóphylos - al-lof'-oo-los - One of another nation

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀλλόφυλος

- Transliteration: Allophulos

- Phonetic: al-lof'-oo-los

- Definition:

1. foreign

- Origin: from G243 and G5443

- TDNT entry: 05:27,4

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G243 and G5443; foreign that is (specifically) Gentile: - one of another nation.
